docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,640.00 FILED BY OGNEV, GEORGIY AS TO DEFENDANT STEINER, ALEC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-22-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OGNEV, GEORGIY ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
REQUEST FOR RUSSIAN INTERPRETER ALREADY CONVEYED TO JULIE ABUSHARKH.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE WAIVED) SERVED DEC-17-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STEINER, ALEC
2ND PROOF OF SERVICE, PERSONAL, FILED AS TO ALEC STEINER, FEE WAIVED.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-22-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-22-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. CERTIFIED RUSSIAN INTERPRETER MARINA BRODSKAYA ASSISTS PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK:S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-22-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OGNEV, GEORGIY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT STEINER, ALEC ANY OBLIGATION THAT PLAINTIFF MIGHT HAVE HAD TO DEFENDANT IS DEEMED SATISFIED BY HIS $697 PAYMENT TO THE TIRD PARTY AUTO SHOP EARL SHEIB. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
